nodes.name: server/mod.rs
nodes.summary: A2A server module — builds the axum sub-app exposing JSON-RPC, SSE, push webhooks, and the well-known AgentCard discovery endpoint.

nodes.name: A2aState
nodes.summary: Cloneable shared application state behind the axum router: card, task store, per-task event channels, executor, budget ledger, push registry, optional peer router and Ed25519 signing key.

nodes.name: A2aServerConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration knobs for the A2A axum sub-app: max body size, permissive CORS toggle, and optional routing block.

nodes.name: A2aServer
nodes.summary: Top-level A2A server handle constructed with new(), exposes router() to mount into a parent axum Router.

nodes.name: TaskEvent
nodes.summary: Broadcasted SSE payload shape — either a Status or Artifact update event for a task.

nodes.name: selector_by_name
nodes.summary: Instantiate a named PeerSelector (cheapest_under_latency / lowest_latency / round_robin); returns None on unknown name.

nodes.name: build_router
nodes.summary: Build an optional PeerRouter from RoutingConfig and spawn background discovery tasks for each configured peer.

nodes.name: boxed_selector_by_name
nodes.summary: Boxed variant of selector_by_name for use inside a ChainedSelector.

nodes.name: discover_and_register
nodes.summary: Async peer-discovery task: fetches a peer's AgentCard, derives its AgentID, and inserts a PeerSnapshot into the registry with one retry on failure.

nodes.name: handle_card
nodes.summary: GET /.well-known/agent.json handler — serves the pre-signed card bytes verbatim.

nodes.name: ensure_stream
nodes.summary: Get or lazily create a bounded (256-capacity) broadcast channel for a task's SSE events.

nodes.name: record_status_event
nodes.summary: Push a TaskStatusUpdateEvent into per-task replay history (capped at EVENT_CHANNEL_CAPACITY) for use by resubscribe.

nodes.name: emit_status_event
nodes.summary: Atomically record and broadcast a status event so SSE replay history stays consistent with the live channel.

nodes.name: server/push.rs
nodes.summary: Push-notification webhooks (ADR-159 M4): HMAC-SHA256 (and optional Ed25519) signed delivery with bounded retry, plus signature verification helpers for receivers.

nodes.name: PushNotificationConfig
nodes.summary: A2A spec-shape webhook config: url + optional token, authentication envelope, and algorithm hint.

nodes.name: PushNotificationRegistry
nodes.summary: In-memory registry of push webhook configs keyed by task id; tracks one-shot warning flags for untokened URLs.

nodes.name: PushError
nodes.summary: Push-delivery error variants: UrlRejected, ConfigMissing, HmacMisconfigured, DeliveryFailed, Transport.

nodes.name: validate_url
nodes.summary: Validate webhook URL — https always OK; http only accepted on loopback hosts.

nodes.name: handle_set
nodes.summary: JSON-RPC tasks/pushNotification/set handler — registers a webhook config after URL validation.

nodes.name: handle_get
nodes.summary: JSON-RPC tasks/pushNotification/get handler — returns the registered webhook config for a task.

nodes.name: dispatch_webhook
nodes.summary: Public dispatch entry point — looks up the webhook config, signs the payload, and delivers with bounded retry; feature-gated twin adds Ed25519 header.

nodes.name: deliver_webhook_impl
nodes.summary: Shared retry/dispatch core: signs body, attempts up to 3 POSTs with exponential backoff (100/400/1600 ms), treats 4xx as terminal and 5xx as retryable.

nodes.name: notify_state_change
nodes.summary: Fire-and-forget convenience wrapper used on every state transition; GCs the registry entry on terminal states.

nodes.name: sign_hmac_header
nodes.summary: Build the sha256=<hex> X-A2A-Signature header value over a body using a shared token.

nodes.name: verify_push_signature
nodes.summary: Constant-time HMAC-SHA256 verification of a webhook X-A2A-Signature header against the body and shared token.

nodes.name: ed25519_sign_body
nodes.summary: Sign body bytes with an Ed25519 signing key and base64-encode the 64-byte signature (feature ed25519-webhooks).

nodes.name: verify_push_signature_ed25519
nodes.summary: Verify the X-A2A-Signature-Ed25519 header using a base64 pubkey from the sender's AgentCard (feature ed25519-webhooks).

nodes.name: server/sse.rs
nodes.summary: Server-Sent Events streaming for A2A: tasks/sendSubscribe and tasks/resubscribe endpoints with bounded broadcast channels and replay history.

nodes.name: resubscribe
nodes.summary: GET /tasks/resubscribe handler — replays buffered status events for a disconnected client then attaches to the live broadcast channel.

nodes.name: event_stream
nodes.summary: Convert a broadcast Receiver of TaskEvents into a text/event-stream-compatible Stream of axum SSE events.

nodes.name: types.rs
nodes.summary: Wire-level A2A spec types: AgentCard, Task, TaskStatus/State, Role, Part, AuthScheme, status/artifact update events — serde with kebab-case state variants and camelCase JSON fields.

nodes.name: artifact_kinds.rs
nodes.summary: Roundtrip tests asserting every ArtifactKind variant (text, structured-json, vector-ref, rulake-witness, raw) survives serde encoding intact.

nodes.name: wire_roundtrip
nodes.summary: Helper that serializes an ArtifactKind to JSON and parses it back, isolating wire-format regressions.

nodes.name: artifact_version_handshake.rs
nodes.summary: Tests for negotiate_version: intersection selection, None on disjoint sets, and explicit unsupported-version errors when decoding future versions.

nodes.name: budget_guard.rs
nodes.summary: BudgetLedger guard tests: shed-policy admits up to cap then rejects; queue-policy enqueues up to depth then returns QueueFull.

nodes.name: card_roundtrip.rs
nodes.summary: End-to-end JSON roundtrip tests for AgentCard: full struct equality, camelCase wire keys, and skill-list preservation.

nodes.name: card_signature.rs
nodes.summary: Card identity-signature tests: signed card verifies and yields the matching AgentID; mutating the card name fails verification.

nodes.name: circuit_breaker.rs
nodes.summary: PeerRegistry circuit-breaker test — three consecutive failures evict a peer from the healthy pool; a success restores it.

nodes.name: tests/common/mod.rs
nodes.summary: Shared test helpers — most notably signed_card(), which mints a canonical signed AgentCard fixture for a given URL.

nodes.name: signed_card
nodes.summary: Construct a canonical AgentCard signed by the given Ed25519 SigningKey for use in integration tests.

nodes.name: config_load.rs
nodes.summary: Verifies the ADR-159 sample TOML loads cleanly and every documented field round-trips into the typed config struct.

nodes.name: dispatch_order.rs
nodes.summary: Asserts the dispatch pipeline ordering — budget exhaustion short-circuits before the peer selector runs, preventing wasted selection work on rejected tasks.

nodes.name: InstrumentedSelector
nodes.summary: Test-only PeerSelector that counts pick invocations to prove selector ordering against budget admission.

nodes.name: DispatchError
nodes.summary: Local dispatch-test error enum distinguishing budget vs selector failures.

nodes.name: DispatchArgs
nodes.summary: Argument bundle for the test-local dispatch() helper — composes budget, selector, and pool inputs.

nodes.name: executor_remote.rs
nodes.summary: Executor parity tests — local executor reaches Completed; remote executor delivers the same artifact/part shape over the A2A wire.

nodes.name: policy_guard.rs
nodes.summary: Policy-guard admission tests: allowed-skills allow/deny, max-concurrency ticketing and release, and pre-flight budget rejection on overestimate.

nodes.name: push_ed25519.rs
nodes.summary: Ed25519-feature integration test — webhook receiver verifies both HMAC and Ed25519 signatures emitted together on a single dispatch.

nodes.name: build_receiver
nodes.summary: Construct an axum Router-based test webhook receiver that streams captured payloads back to the test via an mpsc channel.

nodes.name: push_rejected.rs
nodes.summary: Verifies the push dispatcher treats a 4xx response as terminal — exactly one delivery attempt, no retries.

nodes.name: push_retry.rs
nodes.summary: Push retry test — receiver first returns 5xx then 200; dispatcher retries with backoff and succeeds on the second attempt.

nodes.name: build_receiver
nodes.summary: Helper that wires a flaky axum-based receiver returning a scripted sequence of status codes.

nodes.name: push_signing.rs
nodes.summary: HMAC push signing happy-path test — receiver verifies the X-A2A-Signature header against the configured token.

nodes.name: build_receiver
nodes.summary: Axum test receiver that captures signed payloads for assertion in the push-signing test.

nodes.name: recursion_guard.rs
nodes.summary: Recursion-guard tests — admit at max-depth boundary, reject beyond, reject revisits when deny_revisit is set, and respect the allowlist override.

nodes.name: routing_selectors.rs
nodes.summary: PeerSelector behavior tests: CheapestUnderLatency drops latency violators, LowestLatency picks fastest, RoundRobin rotates deterministically, ChainedSelector falls through.

nodes.name: sse_backpressure.rs
nodes.summary: ADR-159 M2 acceptance test — a fast producer overwhelming a slow consumer drops oldest events without blocking; documents the bounded-channel backpressure policy.

nodes.name: BurstRunner
nodes.summary: Test TaskRunner that bursts a configurable number of status events to exercise the broadcast channel's backpressure policy.
